lx-api-source-loader.description: Used to load LX Music custom source script
lx-api-source-loader.settings.enabledCac: When a song link is successfully retrieved, the song will also be cached in the cache directory
lx-api-source-loader.settings.scriptSour: Configure LX Music custom sources to be enabled, priority will be determined based on the order of enablement
online-metadata.description: Match online song covers and lyrics from played songs, and query public online resources on certain platforms
